tools.name: get_market_snapshot
tools.description: Get current mortgage, TBA, Treasury, SOFR, and fitted MBS-basis observations.

tools.name: get_loan_performance
tools.description: Get bounded GSE loan-performance analytics for one clearly defined topic.

tools.name: search_lenders
tools.description: Find canonical HMDA lender keys, optionally filtered by charter, state, or volume.

tools.name: get_lender_profile
tools.description: Get a bounded HMDA profile for one canonical lender key returned by search_lenders.

tools.name: compare_lenders
tools.description: Compare two canonical HMDA lender keys returned by search_lenders.

tools.name: get_servicer_analytics
tools.description: Get a servicer scorecard, vintage performance fan, or lender transfer analysis.

tools.name: get_dataset_status
tools.description: Get mtgmon dataset coverage, freshness, build, and cache status.
